svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="智能体状态机" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-787" dy="-226" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1520" pageHeight="860" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=26;fontColor=#101828;fontStyle=1;" value="AdOps Copilot 智能体状态机" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="760" x="40" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontColor=#475467;fontStyle=0;" value="状态机约束 Agent 不能自由跳步：权限、Schema、规则复算、工具查询、证据归一和安全交付都必须显式经过。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1240" x="40" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFF8FF;strokeColor=#2E90FA;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="已接收
trace + context" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="70" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFEFF;strokeColor=#06B6D4;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="前置权限检查
pre_guard" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="300" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFDF3;strokeColor=#22C55E;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="LLM 路由候选
intent/entities" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="190" x="530" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#F59E0B;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="Schema Guard
JSON/enum/tool" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="190" x="770" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#F59E0B;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="规则归一
risk/confidence/action" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="210" x="1010" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#F97316;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="Workflow 分发
固定场景" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="1260" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#F59E0B;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="待用户补充" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="180" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEF3F2;strokeColor=#F04438;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="权限拒绝 / 范围外" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="190" x="420" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#F97316;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="证据计划生成

知识/Prompt/评测" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="970" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s18" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F3FF;strokeColor=#8B5CF6;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="Judge AI 离线评测

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #101828;
display: inline-block; font-size: 26px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#101828, #d4dae8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: AdOps Copilot 智能体状态机

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 57px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #475467;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#475467, #9ca7b7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 状态机约束 Agent 不能自由跳步：权限、Schema、规则复算、工具查询、证据归一和安全交付都必须显式经过。
